statement: DPA must eventually consume canonical structured governance objects and generate every human-readable governance form as a non-authoritative projection without introducing new normative meaning.
rationale: This is the intended cross-project standard from AGF through DPA and the Kit and is a direct habitability and self-application requirement for DPA.

source.reference: Project conversation on structured canonical governance, 2026-07-20

statement: Material DPA ideas, rule candidates, risks, questions and important facts that are not immediately incorporated into governed artifacts must be persisted in this repository-local capture ledger before handoff or context loss.
rationale: The Lab must not rely on chat memory for architectural continuity.

source.reference: Project conversation requesting durable pre-graph capture, 2026-07-20
